title: SketchCurves Object
description: A collection of sketch curves in a sketch. This also provides access to collections for the specific types of curves where you can get the curves based on type and create new curves.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: item
methods.description: Function that returns the specified sketch curve using an index into the collection.

properties.name: count
properties.description: Returns the number of sketch curves in the sketch.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: sketchArcs
properties.description: Returns the sketch arcs collection associated with this sketch. This provides access to the existing sketch arcs and supports the creation of new sketch arcs.

properties.name: sketchCircles
properties.description: Returns the sketch circles collection associated with this sketch. This provides access to the existing sketch circles and supports the creation of new sketch circles.

properties.name: sketchConicCurves
properties.description: Returns the conic curves collection associated with this sketch. This provides access to the existing conic curves and supports the creation of new conic curves.

properties.name: sketchControlPointSplines
properties.description: Returns the control point splines collection associated with this sketch. This provides access to the existing control point splines and supports the creation of new control point splines.

properties.name: sketchEllipses
properties.description: Returns the sketch ellipses collection associated with this sketch. This provides access to the existing sketch ellipses and supports the creation of new sketch ellipses.

properties.name: sketchEllipticalArcs
properties.description: Returns the sketch elliptical arcs collection associated with this sketch. This provides access to the existing sketch elliptical arcs and supports the creation of new sketch elliptical arcs.

properties.name: sketchFittedSplines
properties.description: Returns the sketch splines collection associated with this sketch. This provides access to the existing sketch splines and supports the creation of new sketch splines.

properties.name: sketchFixedSplines
properties.description: Returns the fixed sketch splines collection associated with this sketch. This provides access to the existing fixed sketch splines and supports the creation of new fixed sketch splines.

properties.name: sketchLines
properties.description: Returns the sketch lines collection associated with this sketch. This provides access to the existing sketch lines and supports the creation of new sketch lines.

related_samples.name: API Sample that demonstrates creating sketch lines in various ways.
related_samples.description: Demonstrates several ways to create sketch lines, including as the result of creating a rectangle.

related_samples.name: Patch Feature API Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates creating a new patch feature.

related_samples.name: Simple Extrusion Sample
related_samples.description: Creates a new extrusion feature, resulting in a new component.

related_samples.name: Simple Revolve Feature Sample
related_samples.description: Creates a new revolve feature, resulting in a new component.

classType.title: SketchCurves.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

item.title: SketchCurves.item Method
item.description: Function that returns the specified sketch curve using an index into the collection.
item.return_description: Returns the specified item or null if an invalid index was specified.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The index of the item within the collection to return. The first item in the collection has an index of 0.

count.title: SketchCurves.count Property
count.description: Returns the number of sketch curves in the sketch.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = sketchCurves_var.count
